source.purpose: Arc Author procedure-heavy outputs should be evaluated as flexible pressure fields rather than literal mission itineraries.

input.scenarioShape: procedure-heavy pressure field, not fixed route
pressureEngines: deadline window before the noon transfer clock closes
surveillance exposure trace through badge scrutiny and watch logs
military guard escalation if the annex alarm fills
crew trust and inclusion risk if Ren treats support as disposable
chapterFunctions: introduce the deadline force and first support pressure
raise exposure while preserving alternate routes
test whether crew trust or institutional risk becomes the main cost
possibleEndgames: failed insertion that becomes an egress chapter
alternateStanceNotes: Direct assault hardens the guard engine but keeps the crew-trust axis live.
